sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: All 7 S dots are now pink (M). Now all S dots are now M (magenta/pink. The level is not completed yet. Let me check the current state to see what changed and what I need to do next. Maybe I need to click the blue circle again.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print("Nodes:", len(nodes))
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    cr = sum(p[0] for p in b)/len(b)
    cc = sum(p[1] for p in b)/len(b)
    print(n['id'], n['color'], n['pixels'], int(cr), int(cc))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
